name: Lexical
description: Meta's extensible text editor framework with emphasis on reliability, accessibility, and performance

description.value: An extensible text editor framework from Meta with emphasis on reliability, accessibility, and performance

framework.comment: Framework-agnostic core; official @lexical/react bindings for React 18+

base-library.comment: Lexical is an original implementation from Meta

data-model.comment: Native JSON state; @lexical/html and @lexical/markdown for export

typescript.comment: Written in TypeScript with comprehensive type definitions

bundle-size.comment: 22KB gzipped for core; additional plugins add to size

headless.comment: Core is dependency-free; can run without DOM for SSR

offline-support.comment: Via Yjs integration; inherits Yjs offline capabilities

change-tracking.comment: Not built-in; can be implemented via update listeners

images.comment: Image nodes supported; see playground implementation

embeds.comment: Decorator nodes can render any React component

math-latex.comment: Equation plugin in playground with KaTeX support

mentions.comment: Basic mentions in playground; lexical-beautiful-mentions for advanced use

emoji-picker.comment: Emoji plugin in playground with :shortcode: support

slash-commands.comment: Not built-in; open feature request; available in third-party plugins

nested-blocks.comment: Supports nested structures via element nodes

toolbar.comment: No default toolbar; playground shows floating and fixed examples

mobile-support.comment: Web works on mobile; also has native iOS Swift framework

keyboard-shortcuts.comment: Via command system and key bindings

accessibility.comment: First-class feature; WCAG compliance, screen reader support

find-replace.comment: Not built-in; can be implemented via transforms

spell-check.comment: Browser native spell check works with contentEditable

plugin-system.comment: Simple plugin interface - function that receives editor and returns cleanup

custom-nodes.comment: Create custom Element, Text, and Decorator nodes

custom-marks.comment: Text formatting via TextNode and custom nodes

schema-customization.comment: Register custom nodes; no strict schema enforcement

themes.comment: Theme object for CSS class mapping

documentation-quality.comment: Good docs with concepts, API reference; playground provides examples

npm-downloads.comment: Weekly downloads for core lexical package

active-maintenance.comment: Very active; v0.39.0 released December 2025; Meta-backed

commercial-support.comment: No official commercial support; Meta maintains it for internal use
